albums.title: touhou artworks
albums.description: artworks featuring characters from Touhou Project

albums.title: first year of drawing
albums.description: the pictures from when I started art

artworks.title: Orin
artworks.notes: this is the earliest drawing in my pc, I decided to start art on that day and posted it on my pixiv account. a simple paper touhou piece inspired by Waita Uziga 's artstyle

artworks.title: Mokou
artworks.notes: this art was my first drawing of Mokou, the immortal girls are my favorite characters in Touhou

artworks.title: Going postal
artworks.notes: this is the postal dude from postal 2, dark humor old games and movie from back then

artworks.title: Mokou
artworks.notes: this is my first time using Krita, when I began to draw with my laptop and mouse

artworks.title: R-18G Mokou
artworks.notes: here is my first R-18G piece. it is very poor quality and inspired by Shimo's work, I was still learning my tools here

artworks.title: Bullet hell rebel
artworks.notes: a Touhou scene where Seija is getting arrested by the Yamazanadu. I don't know how but it seems I have spent 15 hours on Krita for this one

artworks.title: The two people beyond boundaries
artworks.notes: this is inspired by the touhou fan theory (紫=メリー説) which says that yukari is maribel but a thousand years older, I like it but I don't believe in it

artworks.title: Orange fumo
artworks.notes: this was my first pixiv profile picture, pretty terrible looking but that was the beggining for me
